accept_external_terms.description: When true, record acceptance of external review terms for packet publication.

appendix.description: Operations or data appendix for the review packet.

archive_output.description: When true, also write a finalized copy to the archive packet.

operator_note.description: Optional note to add to the local run record.

skip_review.description: When true, mark the packet as ready for downstream review without a separate checklist.
